object.description: Indicates this is a list response.

id.description: Unique identifier of the API Key.

type.description: The type of the API Key owner.

id.description: Unique identifier of the API Key owner.

owner.description: The entity that owns the API Key.

name.description: A descriptive name for the API Key.

obfuscated_value.description: An obfuscated representation of the API Key value.

last_used_at.description: Timestamp of when the API Key was last used.

expires_at.description: Timestamp when the API Key expires. Null means the key does not expire.

permissions.description: The permission slugs assigned to the API Key.

data.description: The list of records for the current page.

before.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the start of the list.

after.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the end of the list.

list_metadata.description: Pagination cursors for navigating between pages of results.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
